files.content:
# CommentThread

Status: draft
Version: 0.9.0
Comment bottom-sheet: threaded rows + a pinned composer. Built on `Sheet`.

## Usage

```tsx
import { CommentThread, type Comment } from "@/design-system";

<CommentThread
  open={open}
  onOpenChange={setOpen}
  comments={comments}
  onLike={(i, replyIndex) => like(i, replyIndex)}
  onSubmit={(text) => post(text)}
/>
```

## Anatomy

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `open` / `onOpenChange` | `boolean` / `(b) => void` | â€” | Controlled, forwarded to `Sheet`. |
| `comments` | `Comment[]` | â€” | `{ author, time, body, likes, liked?, replies? }`. Replies are one level. |
| `onLike` | `(index, replyIndex?) => void` | â€” | `replyIndex` set when a reply's â™¥ is tapped. |
| `onSubmit` | `(text: string) => void` | â€” | Composer send (trimmed, non-empty). |

## Tokens

- Inherits `Sheet` tokens.
- `--color-surface-container` composer field آ· `--color-brand`/`--color-on-brand` send disc.
- `--color-outline-variant` row dividers + reply border آ· `--color-sell` over-limit counter.
- `.data-sm` like counts.
- `--radius-control` (`rounded-control`) â€” composer field corner.

## States

- **Empty vs N** â€” title pluralizes.
- **Reply** â€” indented 36px with a left border, single level.
- **Liked** â€” â™¥ + count in `text-brand`.
- **Composer** â€” send disabled until non-empty; counter appears at â‰¤ 40 remaining, turns `sell` if negative (input is hard-capped at 280).

## Motion

Sheet slide + drag-dismiss; â™¥ and send buttons press-scale `0.96`.

## A11y

- Title from `Sheet`; â™¥ exposes `aria-pressed`; send has `aria-label` + `disabled`.
- Textarea is a real form control; user text is React-escaped on render.
